sub_pixel_system.notes: GoldSrc engine (modified Quake engine). Sub-pixel precision not documented in available sources.

special_mechanics.name: Long Jump Module (HEV Suit)
special_mechanics.description: Late-game equipment upgrade that allows player to increase horizontal distance and speed of jumps by crouching before jumping. Used for platformer-style jumping puzzles in Xen.

physics_values.horizontal_distance_increase: documented as present, magnitude not specified
physics_values.horizontal_speed_increase: documented as present, magnitude not specified

tier_notes: Tier 1 (empirical/qualitative) - Wikipedia gameplay documentation describes mechanics conceptually but provides no numerical physics parameters. GoldSrc engine details on movement not documented in provided sources.
